prompt: Create a processor that reads from Kafka 'logs' and writes to S3 bucket 'company-logs'

resource_naming_strategy.note: Appends Unix timestamp to processor name

test_prerequisites.workspace: Use existing workspace with Kafka and S3 connections

connections_required.name: <any-s3-connection>
connections_required.note: S3 connection requires IAM role ARN registered via Atlas Cloud Provider Access

test_prerequisites.skip_if_missing: If no S3 connection exists, test should validate that agent mentions AWS prerequisites but cannot create processor

pre_test_setup.action: Call atlas-streams-discover action='list-connections' to find Kafka and S3 connections

assertions.name: pipeline_ends_with_emit
assertions.description: Last pipeline stage is $emit (not $merge for S3)

assertions.name: emit_uses_path_not_prefix
assertions.reason: Common mistake: S3 $emit uses 'path', not 'prefix'. Using wrong field name causes processor failure.

assertions.name: mentions_aws_prerequisites
assertions.description: Response mentions IAM role ARN must be registered via Atlas Cloud Provider Access

common_mistakes.error: Processor fails with field validation error
